description: DIVIDE negative number with REMAINDER — IBM truncate-toward-zero semantics
notes: DIVIDE -17 BY 5: IBM truncates toward zero. Q = trunc(-17/5) = trunc(-3.4) = -3. R = -17 - (-3 * 5) = -17 + 15 = -2. Python divmod gives (-4, 3) which is WRONG for COBOL. The engine must use truncation division, not floor division. Display format with leading sign/zeros may vary.
